entities.name: TROPICAL LEGUMES III PROJECT
entities.description: A project aimed at reducing food insecurity in drought-prone areas of Sub Saharan Africa and South Asia through improved productivity of grain legumes

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: The state of being without reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall, leading to water shortages

entities.name: SUB SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region of Africa south of the Sahara desert

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The southern region of Asia

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A major grain legume targeted for improved productivity and production

entities.name: LEGUME BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved legume varieties to enhance productivity and farmer preference

entities.name: SEED DELIVERY SYSTEMS
entities.description: Sustainable systems established to service the seed needs of small-holder farmers
